hero.title: Strategic Legal Defense in Oaxaca
hero.subtitle: PRIVATE LAW (FAMILY, CIVIL, COMMERCIAL AND ADMINISTRATIVE). We protect your assets with strategy and results.

authority.title: Legal Authority in
authority.description1: We deeply understand the legal and administrative environment of the State of Oaxaca. Our firm distinguishes itself for meticulous analysis and impeccable execution in every case we handle before local and federal courts.
authority.description2: Whether you face a disproportionate property tax charge from the municipality of Oaxaca de Juárez, Santa Lucía del Camino or Xoxocotlán, or need to secure your family assets through an inheritance proceeding, we provide absolute legal certainty.
authority.mission_text: To provide specialized legal services in private law with excellence, ethics, and commitment, offering comprehensive and personalized legal solutions that protect our clients' interests in the state of Oaxaca. We focus on building trust through close, transparent, and effective legal support in every matter.
authority.vision_text: To consolidate as a leading legal firm in Oaxaca in the field of private law, recognized for its professionalism, innovation, and results, contributing to the legal and social development of the region, and positioning ourselves as a benchmark for quality and trust at the state and national levels.
authority.feature1_desc: In-depth analysis of each case file.
authority.feature2_desc: Total transparency in fees and processes.

expertise.title: Areas of
expertise.subtitle: Specialty
expertise.description: Our practice focuses on critical areas of law in Oaxaca, where precision and strategy determine case success.

municipal.title: Municipal Law
municipal.description: Defense against excessive property tax charges in Oaxaca de Juárez and surrounding municipalities through nullity lawsuits.

civil.title: Civil Law
civil.description: Property regularization (Usucaption), Summary Mortgage Trial, inheritance proceedings (intestate and testamentary) and high-rigor contract drafting.

familiar.title: Family Law
familiar.description: Strategic resolution of no-fault divorces, child support, and custody before the Family Courts of Centro Oaxaca.

administrativo.title: Administrative Law
administrativo.description: Defense against business closures, traffic fines, and arbitrary acts by municipal and state authorities.

mercantil.title: Commercial Law
mercantil.description: Commercial oral trials, Executive Commercial Trial, debt recovery, promissory notes, invoices, unrecognized charges, and amparo proceedings.

hero.title: Success
hero.subtitle: Our best reference are the results. Learn how we have protected the assets, freedom and rights of our clients in Oaxaca.

case1.title: Loan II Promissory Note
case1.summary: Thanks to a proper legal strategy, Ms. Edenia managed to recover the money she had lent to acquaintances who had signed a promissory note but refused to fulfill their payment obligation. Through the corresponding lawsuit, both the principal amount and interest were successfully recovered, ensuring her rights were protected.

case2.title: No-Fault Divorce and Child Support
case2.summary: Ms. Leticia successfully formalized her divorce efficiently through a strategic legal approach. By drafting a comprehensive prior agreement, we established clear rights and obligations for both parties, including fair child support. This process prioritized the children's well-being and achieved a swift, favorable resolution for all involved.

case3.title: Defense of Landowners in Wind Farm Lease Contracts
case3.summary: We advised land owners in reviewing and renegotiating lease contracts with wind energy companies.

case4.title: Nullification of Excessive Property Tax Charges
case4.summary: We successfully challenged an arbitrary cadastral update that multiplied the property tax of several commercial properties.

faq.title: Frequently
faq.subtitle: Asked Questions
faq.answer_location: Our main offices are located in Oaxaca de Juárez, attending by appointment only to guarantee your privacy.
faq.answer_costs: Fees vary according to the complexity of the case. We offer a first free evaluation consultation to provide you with a transparent budget.
faq.question_abroad: If I live abroad, can I sue?
faq.answer_abroad: Yes, it is possible to initiate and carry out legal processes in Mexico through a power of attorney or appropriate legal representation without the need for you to travel.

cta.title: Need advice on {service}?
cta.description: Schedule a confidential consultation at our offices in Oaxaca de Juárez to analyze your case and design an effective legal strategy.

testimonial1.quote: The municipality of Oaxaca wanted to charge me an absurd amount of property tax for a supposed update. Counselor Karina filed a nullity lawsuit and we managed to reduce the payment by 60%. Excellent lawyer, very professional.
testimonial1.author: Roberto M.

testimonial2.quote: We had been trying for years to fix the deeds of my grandparents' house. Thanks to their advice on the intestate succession proceeding, we finally have legal certainty about our family heritage in Jalatlaco.
testimonial2.author: García Family

testimonial3.quote: My divorce process was fast and without complications thanks to their intervention. They achieved a fair agreement for my children's child support. I highly recommend their law firm.
testimonial3.author: Ana Lilia S.
